key_theorem: BSD Self-Referential Consistency (T98, S365): The BSD assault (S356-S365) has tropical depth 3: consistent with shadow(BSD)=3. 4 independent near-proof routes established: (1) BSD-ECL via Ratio Depth Lemma; (2) Shadow Normalization (rank 0,1 proven); (3) Tropical Consistency (4 stress tests passed); (4) Langlands Bypass (Hecke operator known).
